revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Gunma Prefectural Museum of History]][[ff:Gunma Prefectural Museum of History]][[ja:群馬県立歴史博物館]]
{{Use dmy dates|date=November 2019}} {{Infobox building | name = Gunma Prefectural Museum of History | native_name = 群馬県立歴史博物館 | image = Gunma-pref-History-museum.jpg | caption = | cost = | owner = | address = 992-1 Watanuki-machi | location_town = [[:en:Takasaki, Gunma|Takasaki]], {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}} | location_country = {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|qid=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}} | coordinates = {{coord|36.298511|N|139.079482|E|display=title,inline|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP_scale:10000}} | opened_date = 1979 | inauguration_date = | renovation_date = | demolition_date = | destruction_date = | other_dimensions = | floor_count = | floor_area = | architect = | architecture_firm = | website = {{homepage|http://grekisi.pref.gunma.jp/index.html}} }}
{{nihongo|'''Gunma Prefectural Museum of History'''|群馬県立歴史博物館|Gunma kenritsu rekishi hakubutsukan}} opened in [[:en:Takasaki, Gunma|Takasaki]], {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma Prefecture|1=Gunma Prefecture}}, Japan, in 1979.<ref>{{cite web |url=http://www.city.takasaki.gunma.jp/docs/2013120900202/ |script-title=ja:高崎の歩み |trans-title=A walk-through of Takasaki |language=Japanese |publisher=[[:en:Takasaki, Gunma|Takasaki City]] |accessdate=25 May 2015}}</ref><ref>{{cite web |url=http://grekisi.pref.gunma.jp/index.html |script-title=ja:群馬県立歴史博物館 |trans-title=Gunma Prefectural Museum of History |language=Japanese |publisher=Gunma Prefectural Museum of History |accessdate=25 May 2015 |archive-date=25 May 2015 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150525162327/http://grekisi.pref.gunma.jp/index.html |url-status=dead }}</ref>
==See also== * {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Gunma)|en|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Gunma)|qid=Q16248234|lt=List of Historic Sites of Japan (Gunma)|1=List of Historic Sites of Japan (Gunma)}} * {{ill|The Museum of Modern Art, Gunma|en|The Museum of Modern Art, Gunma|qid=Q11609688|lt=The Museum of Modern Art, Gunma|1=The Museum of Modern Art, Gunma}} * [[:en:List of Cultural Properties of Japan - paintings (Gunma)|List of Cultural Properties of Japan - paintings (Gunma)]] * {{ill|List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|en|List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|qid=Q6591583|lt=List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)|1=List of National Treasures of Japan (archaeological materials)}}
==References== {{Reflist}}
==External links== * {{in lang|ja}} [http://grekisi.pref.gunma.jp Gunma Prefectural Museum of History]
{{Authority control}}
